title: abelmoschus moschatus subsp. tuberosus
intro: Abelmoschus moschatus subsp. tuberosus, also known as the tuberous Musk Mallow, is a subspecies of the Abelmoschus moschatus plant, which is a type of flowering plant native to Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Abelmoschus moschatus subsp. tuberosus include its ability to reduce inflammation and pain, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used in traditional perfumery and cosmetics.
